mapper.select: SELECT content_filter_word_seq AS contentFilterWordSeq, category, keyword, use_yn AS useYn, sort_order AS sortOrder, remark FROM content_filter_word WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY LENGTH(keyword) DESC, sort_order ASC, content_filter_word_seq ASC

SELECT content_filter_word_seq AS contentFilterWordSeq, category, keyword, use_yn AS useYn, sort_order AS sortOrder, remark, DATE_FORMAT(create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM content_filter_word
ORDER BY
category keyword sort_order content_filter_word_seq
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{safeSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT content_filter_word_seq AS contentFilterWordSeq, category, keyword, use_yn AS useYn, sort_order AS sortOrder, remark, DATE_FORMAT(create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM content_filter_word WHERE content_filter_word_seq = #{contentFilterWordSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_filter_word (category, keyword, use_yn, sort_order, remark, create_dt, modify_dt) VALUES (#{category}, #{keyword}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrder}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE content_filter_word SET category = #{category}, keyword = #{keyword}, use_yn = #{useYn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, remark = #{remark}, modify_dt = NOW() WHERE content_filter_word_seq = #{contentFilterWordSeq}
